content: agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch only that file. Will ping before finishing.

Ack — I'm adding an optional path_transform: Callable[[str], str] = None param to __init__ of FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, plus applying it at top of get_source/load. Since you're touching FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates for fallback_searchpath, let's avoid clobbering: I'll add path_transform as the LAST kwarg in FileSystemLoader.__init__ signature, and apply it as the very first step inside get_source (transform template -> lookup name), leaving your fallback_searchpath logic below untouched. Shout if you want a different ordering.

Thanks — fyi in my working copy of loaders.py I don't see fallback_searchpath (looks like we have separate copies/sandboxes for this benchmark), so no actual conflict on disk. My path_transform changes are done and tests pass (841 passed). Good luck!
